  "claims": [
    "SB 1206 incentivizes the creation of a first-of-its-kind battery manufacturing facility for next generation batteries in the greater San Francisco Bay Area.",
    "The bill aims to decrease costs and increase access to next-generation batteries.",

    "The public-private partnership model proposed by SB 1206 is based on a model proven successful by ARCHES.",
    "This legislation supports California’s efforts to bring down tax credits and loans from the Inflation Reduction Act.",
